entry.title: Re: upload Internal table data to application server in .xls

entry.title: HCM Adoption Mission- "SuccessFactors Latest Goals Universal Push Customer Enablement Session"(AMER)
entry.content:
PLEASE NOTE: Selecting the option "Yes" to "Will you be attending?" will NOT register you for the event. To register for the event, please REGISTER HERE in order to receive the event invite and login details. 

“SuccessFactors Latest Goals Universal Push Customer Enablement Session” Global Series

The migration from the legacy version of Goal Management to the latest version is approaching. This process will occur in two phases: the initial migration is scheduled for 29th March 2025, and the subsequent one on 27th December, 2025. We invite you to attend our informative sessions to learn about the migration criteria, receive essential notes for cycle planning, explore additional feature plans, and understand the legacy feature deprecation schedule. We encourage you to come prepared with any questions you may have.

For more information on the rest of the series, visit the SAP Community Blog.

 

AMER – Tuesday 25th February 2025
1:00 pm EST Eastern Time
REGISTRATION

 

If you have any questions, please get in touch with the VIP Program Managers: 

vanesa.medricka@sap.com and samanta.ferreri@sap.com

entry.title: Re: BusinessObject DEV CMS DB deleted .How to refresh it...

entry.title: Re: How to use Digital Manufacturing MDOs within Custom Plugins – Example: Where Used Report
entry.content:
Hi Katja,

thank you for this blog. Its very informative. Im facing an issue in the POD designer. 

I have implemented all the PPD and the Plugin to my DM tenant. I can see all the data and the UI in POD. But in the POD designer I only see few of the default config settings. I dont see the PPD ID row in the POD designer. Could you please help us understand how to get this data in the POD designer tab. 

KR,
Sayuj

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA OP/Private Cloud
entry.content: thanks for great blog, can we use advanced stock transfer for return secaniro?

entry.title: Re: Implicit enhancement is permitted in SAP certified product or not?.
entry.content:
Hello @avinash96k 

The best or at least the safest practice is not to implement any ABAP enhancements at all, be it user exits, BAdIs or enhancement points. ABAP enhancements change SAP standard logic in a way that SAP can't fully control. Therefore they can't be held accountable if anything goes wrong. Of course more often than not ABAP enhancements are unavoidable. SAP software is immensely flexible, but event it can't cover all business requirements. 

Second best practice is to implement ABAP enhancements within SAP provided spots, i.e. user exits, BAdIs etc. Here SAP still has some control of a custom ABAP logic, e.g. through an enhancement interface. Thus, the potential damage by an enhancement going awry can be limited, not fully, but at least to some extent. 

If SAP provided enhancement spots are not enough, then as the last resort standard code needs to be modified. Here you are definitely on your own and without SAP support. That can be implemented either with implicit enhancements or with direct modifications. Paradoxically, in my opinion, direct modifications are often better and safer than implicit enhancements. They are also easier to maintain during upgrades. I know that is against the conventional wisdom.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: How to delete existing queues WM?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

As part of my current project, I have defined queues for outbound, inbound, internal, production, and Physical inventory processes. However, post development, in the testing phase, I received a recommendation from client to use different queue names.

The initial changes are already moved to the test system. Now when I try to delete the existing queues to replace it with new names, I am unable to find the option to delete the existing queue names.

Please suggest me a way to delete these queue names or rename these queues.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to delete existing queues WM?
entry.content:
In SAP, once a queue is created and used, it cannot be deleted directly from the system. This is because the system keeps a history of all the actions performed using that queue. However, you can rename the queue to match the new names suggested by your client. To do this, you would need to create new queues with the desired names and then reassign the processes from the old queues to the new ones. Here are the steps to do this:

  1. Create new queues with the names suggested by your client.
  2. Reassign the outbound, inbound, internal, production, and physical inventory processes from the old queues to the new ones.
  3. Once all processes have been reassigned, the old queues will no longer be in use. While they will still exist in the system, they will not be associated with any active processes.

Please note that this process should be done carefully to avoid any disruption to your warehouse operations. It’s recommended to perform these changes during a maintenance window or when the warehouse operations are at a minimum.

For further information, please check the documents below:

Resource Management

Mobile Warehousing – SAP S/4HANA Cloud Warehouse Management

 

Best regards,

Geovana

entry.title: Physical file location on SAP Content Server
entry.content:
Hello,

we use a SAP Content Server 7.53 for storing SAP Office Documents in the Windows File system via KPro.

Is there any way to find the phsyical file location on the Content Server by using a Function Module and the DOC ID/PHIO?

Background: I try to migrate the documents to KGS Content Server and there are some attachments with special characters (€ for example) that cannot be migrated because the character conversion doesn't seem to work and we need to find out what is written in the info file on the content server as the component name.

Thank you and best regards,

Christopher

entry.title: Re: Assignment profile stopped executing after I removed...
entry.content:
If you make a change to an AP and you save it but do not “execute” it:

• The system freezes the pool of employees that have already been selected by the AP (using the original criteria). Meaning it will not add anyone, and it will not remove anyone during the Assignment Profile Execute Updates automatic process. Even if:

1. the user in the original pool now does not fit the original criteria

2. A new user now fits the original criteria.) – The entire AP and the pool of users is frozen as the system thinks you are still working on it.

Once you execute the changes:

• This step “propagates” the AP. It ‘finalizes’ it, and the system now sees that this AP is ready to be used – but this doesn’t yet do anything from a user perspective (doesn’t assign & doesn’t unassign).

After Execute Changes, you can:

1. Immediately click “Update User’s and Assignments” which will “synchronize” the changes made to the AP to the users themselves. This assigns or remover the Curricula, Role, and/or Library access assigned to any Assignment Profiles that the new records match or no longer match.

OR

2. You can wait until the APM (Assignment Profile Execute Updates) runs, which automatically does that synchronization for you. Depending on the frequency which this is scheduled, this may work for you – but option 1 does it immediately.

What is key to understand here, is that if you do not Execute the changes to an AP (after you have saved them), the Assignment Profile Execute Updates automatic process SKIPS that assignment profile. So, it will no longer do any user synchronization. So, always execute changes after you have ‘saved’ an assignment profile.

entry.title: Product Roadmap

entry.title: Calculation View Features of SAP HANA 2.0 SPS08
entry.content:
With the release of SAP Web IDE SPS08 and HANA 2.0 SPS08, new features in the area of calculation view modeling will become available that had only been released in SAP HANA Cloud before.

Below is a short description of newly released features. For examples of the individual features have a look at the respective project "SPS08_Selected_Calculation_View_Modeling_Features" that can be found here. 

A general overview of new calculation view features can be found here.

 

Performance: Column Based Pruning

Several Union Pruning techniques exist that help to exclude early the processing of data sources of union nodes. Excluding data sources early can have a huge effect in terms of query runtime and memory reduction. For an overview of the different pruning techniques, see the SAP HANA Performance Guide for Developers.

In the past the criteria for excluding data sources were based on filter values. With column based pruning a new option is available that prunes data sources based on whether a data source is mapped to a so called "Focus Column". If a data source does not contribute any Focus Column and a Focus Column is requested in the query then the data source is pruned.

This pruning technique can be used, for example, if an analysis is focusing only on data sources that contribute to a measure of interest. In this situation the measure can be defined as a Focus Column.

In the following example, measure "SALES" is only mapped for data source "SalesOrders2019" but not for data source "SalesOrders2020":

Measure "SALES" is defined as Focus Column:


As a consequence, data source "salesOrders2020" will be pruned because it does not deliver values for the Focus Column "SALES". This means that the result will only contain entries with year "2019":


If column based pruning is switched off,


records of both sources are delivered:

 

 

Given that measure "SALES" is NULL for all records from "SalesOrders2020", no bar appears for the value of measure "SALES" for year "2020".

Column based pruning can be an effective means to exclude data sources early if these data sources do not contribute values for "Focus Columns". Excluding data sources early during processing can significantly reduce runtime and memory consumption.

 

Deprecate Views and Block Queries

The option to mark a calculation view as deprecated is enhanced by an option to also block queries to the calculation view. Instead of the query results a configurable information message is shown to the user executing the query.

Use this option to manage the lifecycle of calculation views and to prepare the roll-out of replacement information.

Information about the deprecation status of a view can be found in columns DEPRECATED and DEPRECATION_NOTE of view _SYS_BI.BIMC_CUBES.

The options to deprecate a calculation view are available under View Properties:

 

 

Calculation Views that consume deprecated calculation views will show a warning in the design time model:

Greedy Join Pruning


Greedy join pruning is an expert performance technique that allows pruning to occur independent of join type or cardinality settings. Greedy join pruning can speed up queries considerably when a query involves multiple joins. However, in contrast to join pruning it can have an impact on the results. Therefore, make sure to familiarize yourself with the technique, e.g., in the Developer Performance Guide

 

 

Greedy join pruning improves performance by join pruning optimization techniques that can be leveraged by expert calculation view modelers.

User-Defined Functions in Expressions

 

User-Defined functions can now be used in expressions of e.g., filters, calculated columns, restricted columns or masking columns to
    •  pre-process values of input parameters
    •  reuse logic in different calculation views
 
You can select User-Defined Functions similarly to how you select delivered functions. In the expression editor, the list of User-Defined Functions is structured into two sections: functions in the same project and synonyms that point to User-Defined Functions:
 
If the user-defined function returns multiple parameters all parameters are shown and can be chosen in the expression editor :

entry.title: Re: Using the BAPI_CREATE_SHIPMENT
entry.content:
Hi,

As there is a bug when entering the TIME_TYPE in HEADER- and STAGEDEADLINE (entries are not kept), I was looking for a note on the support portal.

I couldn't find one related to that issue, just changed the content of the structures in debug to enter the different TIME_TYPE.

However, I found another note that helped withe TIME_TYPE in the BAPI_SHIPMENT_CREATE.

The documentation of the FM is unclear and even not correct if you display the doc for structures HEADERDEADLINE and STAGEDEADLINE.

The different TIME_TYPE to use can be found in the code, but also in the note 531207 - Use of BAPI_SHIPMENT_CREATE concerning shipping statuses.

entry.title: Re: Dump in ALV in Background
entry.content:
20.11.2024:
I recently had the same problem and managed to solve it, by running 

    me->mo_splitter_container->set_enable(
          EXPORTING
            enable            = ' '                  " Enable/disable state flag
*        EXCEPTIONS
*          cntl_error        = 1                " CNTL_ERROR
*          cntl_system_error = 2                " CNTL_SYSTEM_ERROR
*          others            = 3
        ).

before freeing my mo_splitter object, 
so i can only guess it was some wierd solution,
there might be a better solution to this, but for now this works for me

Regards Dennis

entry.title: When Entering a Sales Order getting message KIC180 You must enter company code error
entry.content:
We are trying to set a new entity to complete Sales Orders, we have already had one entity set up by our SAP partner, but we trying to understand this ourselves


I have completed the steps detailed below but when I try to Enter a Sales order (VA01) at the header stage I get message “You must enter a company code for transaction Create sales document Message no. KI180” (SAP message KIC180 You must enter a company code for tr)

As I do not get this when I enter a Sales Order for our previous entity.

Can anyone advise where I should be checking as clearly, I have missed a configuration step, thank you

The steps I have completed are;

Sales Organisation definition     

  1. Step 1-Create Credit Control Area - previously completed.
  2. Step 2- Assign Company Code to Credit Control Area - previously completed.
  3. Step 3- Define Sales Organization (IMG->Enterprise Structure->Definition->Sales & Distribution)
  4. Step 4- Assign Sales Org to Company Code (IMG->Enterprise Structure->Assignment->Sales & Distribution)
  5. Step 5- Define Distribution Channel (IMG->Enterprise Structure->Definition->Sales & Distribution)
  6. Step 6- Assign Distribution Channel to Sales Organization (IMG->Enterprise Structure->Assignment->Sales & Distribution)
  7. Step 7- Create Divisions (IMG->Enterprise Structure->Definition->Sales & Distribution)
  8. Step 8- Assign Divisions to Sales Organizations (IMG->Enterprise Structure->Definition->Sales & Distribution)
  9. Step 9- Set Up Sales Area (All Combinations of Sales Orgs, Distribution Channels & Divisions) (IMG->Enterprise Structure->Definition->Sales & Distribution)

Pricing

  1. Set up pricing determination VOK0->Pricing Procedure-Proc Determination

entry.title: Re: CMIR Classification Data Extraction
entry.content: Please clarify - CMIR has no classification. But in general, table AUSP holds the characteristic values assigned to a classified object.

entry.title: Re: S4HANA PUBLIC CLOUD EDITION - CDS_VIEW FOR TAX RATE I...
entry.content:
Hi Guillermo,

In the View Browser, if you go to the advanced search you can search for tables or columns.

I did a quick search - there are views but they are not released - meaning they are not exposed except for internal application use.

If you have the Abap developer tools installed, you could check there for options in Developer Extensibility, assuming you have a 3SL system.

You don't mention your use case if it is side by side or On Stack. (or in app or BADI)

Have you looked at the available public apis? https://api.sap.com/products/SAPS4HANACloud/apis/all

 

Or maybe one of the available on stack business objects

Maybe Pricing Access helps: https://api.sap.com/cdsviews/I_PRICINGACCESS?

Thank you

Jerry

 

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: ASUG Tech Connect SWAG - Dallas community
entry.content: likewise.. it was a great time meeting you and seeing all the other people there

entry.title: Second Half 2024 Release: What's new for SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals?
entry.content:
The second half 2024 product release went live on November 15 and brings many exciting innovations for SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals, including new AI capabilities. With these new innovations customers will be able to leverage AI to make it easier for employees to do their jobs and enhance experiences, delighting end users while supporting evolving business needs.

With this release, we are unveiling AI-assisted 360-degree reviews with AI-generated comments and AI-assisted feedback to help drive employee professional growth. By simplifying and personalizing the feedback process in 360-degree reviews, we are making it easier for employees to access actionable insights, key strengths, and areas for improvement. Leveraging the power of generative AI, your employees can now deliver well-crafted, insightful comments aligned with ratings on skills, goals, and competencies - reducing the effort required to write detailed feedback. Additionally, AI-assisted feedback further enhances precision by integrating rating context and user input, saving time while delivering professional-quality results.

With this latest release, we also introduce delegation in performance management, allowing managers to designate trusted colleagues as appraisers in performance forms. This enhancement brings efficiency and flexibility to the process, allowing managers to delegate tasks, select specific employees for review, and choose appropriate performance form templates. This adaptable manager self-service experience is tailored to meet the needs of dynamic, cross-functional teams within organizations.

We’re also introducing more Joule capabilities that enable employees to update their goal
progress, add comments, and create continuous performance management activities and achievements in a simple, conversational manner.

And we are also pleased to share some innovations on the road map for the release in the 1H  2025. With the new performance management experience, employees will have access to a new, user-friendly interface that simplifies performance tasks and provides AI-driven insights, helping managers offer personalized, actionable guidance to their teams.

To read about the latest 2H innovations for our other talent solutions check out:

SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting
SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding
SAP SuccessFactors Learning
SAP SuccessFactors Career and Talent Development – coming soon

Discover more 2H 2024 innovations across the suite by checking out the release highlights brochure, overview video featuring Bianka Woelke, and much more on the Product Release & Road Map Information page.

All product features and delivery dates mentioned in this document represent current product development expectations only and not a delivery commitment. You should base your purchasing, administrative, and configuration decisions solely on functionality that is currently available.

entry.title: Assistance Required for Configuring Task Release in Production Orders - SAP ByDesign
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently, when a production order is released for warehouse pick, the system generates multiple tasks for the same production order, each containing a single line item. We would like to adjust the configuration so that the system releases only one consolidated task per production order rather than multiple individual tasks.

Thank you in advance for your assistance. I look forward to your insights on this matter.

entry.title: Where can I learn how to use diverse channels in SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Exploring Omnichannel Marketing Capabilities with SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement learning journey.

Overview
In this Learning Journey, participants will explore different SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement channels, learn content creation strategies for channels, understand their interconnections, explore their benefits, apply them in omnichannel marketing, and analyze and report on their effectiveness in driving successful digital marketing campaigns.

Learning objectives
At the end of this course, End Users, Marketing Managers, Content Creators (End Users), and Specialists (Architects) will be able to use diverse channels in SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement and apply effective omnichannel marketing strategies to boost brand performance and improve campaign reach and revenue.

 

Prerequisites
As a prerequisite, participants must complete the following: 

  • The “Getting Started with SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement,” Learning Journey
  • The Emarsys basic onboarding on the Emarsys Academy

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge 


Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Free Services on Rise
entry.content: for Rise with S/4HANA cloud , PCE , What are the services provided free of cost to the purchaser as part of Annual Charges

entry.title: Re: 🟣 Set Up Rules for Who Can Create and Transport SAP Build Projects
entry.content:
Thanks Dan for the reply and i got the answer. Sorry about confusion and asking in wrong blog 🙂 , Just to clarify my question was about sequence of transports of following objects.

1. SAP Build Work process automation - Workflows
2. SAP Build apps - UI Contents, forms, backend VCF
3. HTML Apps (Deployed from Build apps)
4. SAP Build work Zone
5. Roles
6. Destinations

After transports of 1 and 2 in target subaccount, we need to activate and deploy and it will generate html apps in target space. Pre-requites is having active subscription of Build apps and Build Process automation in target subaccount.
Transport of SAP Build work zone contents Sites, space, pages, Roles in target subaccount.

entry.title: Re: Seamless Planning - Beta Program Highlights

entry.title: Re: Payment Means Icon is missing from a 4k screen
entry.content:
Dear @intdelights230 , 

Recommend to report the issue via support incident. 

In the meantime, I can suggest the following work arounds:

- Use the keyboard shortcut "CTRL + Y"

- From the context menu choose "Payment Means"

- From the "Go To" menu choose "Payment Means"

Best regards,

Maya

entry.title: Re: Change valuation class for multiple periods/single pe...
entry.content:
Hello @ArnoBrouwer 

To my knowledge if you go from period 6 to 7, valuation class of period 6 will be used in period 7.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: 🟣 Set Up Rules for Who Can Create and Transport SAP Build Projects
entry.content: Thanks Harald for reply 🙂 , you made it clear. We are using cTMS for transporting workzone contents. My assumption was CTMS handles also build Apps and build process automation contents without manual Import and rebuild/deploy in Lobby by developers.

entry.title: Re: Header Discount is not considered in SES
entry.content:
Hello Raja,

I know it's too late to help you in this, but I wanted to put it for others too

I had a similar case. You have to make sure whatever condition is in the PO header, it should be reflected also in the item level. It's the same for materials or services.

entry.title: Re: SVT PROD Scenario
entry.content:
Reason found; this issue is resolved.

My understanding.

The system compares Produced vs Consumed as the basic concept that we know. But for planned qty also, the system checks consumption even though the production order confirmation is not yet done and produced qty is not yet posted. I might be missing this earlier. I have tried to explain with example.

Example 1:

Example 2:

Ashish

entry.title: Approver workflow for standard fiori application
entry.content:
Hi experts 

Is it technically possible to include a business approval workflow into a standard Fiori application? For example in the "Manage Cost Centers (Version 2)" Fiori app F1443A I need to have an approver in place before the cost center get created. We are exploring a clean core way of handling this approval workflow without creation of a custom fiori application.

In general we want to have a business rule with input as Fiori app id and requestor and get the approver as output. Then the workflow must be in the My inbox of the approver and once approver the business document to be created. 

Appreciate your inputs. 

SAP Build SAP Workflow Management, business rules capability 

Br,

Vijay V

entry.title: Re: Bidirectional integration between SAP SuccessFactors & Azure Active Directory in Microsoft Azure
entry.content:
Hello! Thank you for sharing this blog.

Could someone share how they handled the mapping of manager id field in SF to manager attribute in AD? The user provisioning is failing with an error message stating that manager is defined as a reference property whereas the source managerid in SAP SF is string property. Seems like mapping a "string" to a "reference" is meant for use in a very specific scenario even though this is part of the default mapping between SAP SF and Azure AD.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Key Highlights from the 2H 2024 Release of SuccessFactors Onboarding
entry.content:
Hi, I'm trying to setup this section: 5- Enhancements to Internal Hire Process.

I made the adjustments in the first bullet. 
I'm lost though where to assign the necessary business rules to kick off the required workflow. Could you explain that a bit more in detail? I know how to make a workflow (in manage org) and to make a business rule and link the two together. But where do I assign the business rule to the recruiting process?

Configuration Requirements:

  • Enable>Process Settings>Onboarding General Settings>Enable Enhanced Internal Hire Process >EnableAdditional Internal Hire Activities switch.
  • You must define the approvers, triggers, and notifications to configure the workflow.

entry.title: Re: is it possible to see warnings in time sheet entry, n...
entry.content:
I don't believe that it is currently possible. I did just see a Customer Influence request for this though. If you are interested, you could vote for it. 

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#idea/335517

entry.title: Setting up the Target Population for Delegator in Delegation for Performance Reviews
entry.content:
Dear all,

What are the available configuration options in RBP for creating the target population for a manager as delegator to be able to select the delegates as peers or his direct manager.

If no field is available to follow this structure (peers and or manager's manager), means we need to create one and maintain such a field as level in the organization in employee profile?

Thank you!

Alexandra

entry.title: Standard Text Key in Fiori apps for maintenance orders
entry.content:
Dear,

A particular customer wishes to use the standard text field (AFVGD-KTSCH) in the operations overview for maintenance orders and task lists :

This field is still available when using the SAP GUI in S/4HANA ( as you can see in printscreen above),however in the Fiori applications for both Public and Private Cloud S/4HANA this field is no longer displayed in apps such as: " Change Maintenance Order", " Manage Maintenance Notifications & Orders", " Create Task list" etc.
We have also checked the settings button in the operation overview and the field is nowhere to be found:

Has this field been removed in Fiori or can it be added through development or configuration?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP Job Scheduling Service + Cloud Application Programming Model application (CAP) + SAP Authori
entry.content: Hi @thomasnelissen we are facing the same problem here ... Which cds.requires.auth kind are you using to solve this issue ? Basic, jwt ?. Thanks for your help !!

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI Groovy Script Blanked Out
entry.content:
Have you tried to revert the iflow to a previous version, you may be able to see it there. 

 

Daniel Graversen

entry.title: Re: How to Read Data Stored in SAP Datasphere from SAP BW Bridge
entry.content:
Hello @Dominik_Graus,
Thanks for sharing this step-by-step solution, we'll try it out in our bwbridge projects.

I have a question: Ii this solution the 'Using data from the solution as a source for SAP Datasphere, SAP BW bridge' item planned for Q4 2024 from Datasphere Roadmap?
https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=73555000100800002141&range=CURRENT-LAST#;INNO=000D3AAADBCE1EEC8FC7403F8FE56994

Best Regards,
Andrea

entry.title: Issue with Split Accounting Behavior in Ariba Buying Integration with SAP Backend
entry.content:
We are encountering an issue in SAP Ariba Buying, integrated (via Cloud Integration Gateway) with an SAP backend system (S/4HANA or ECC), where the split accounting behavior is not aligning as expected. 

  • When users select a split accounting option in Ariba Buying (percentage, amount, or quantity), the backend system always defaults to “2 Distribute Proportionally” in the Accounting Data tab. The expected behavior is for the system to default to “1 Distribute in Sequence."
  • The issue persists regardless of the split accounting method selected in Ariba Buying 

 

Any insights or recommendations to address this issue would be greatly appreciated!

SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing SAP Integration Suite, managed gateway for spend management and SAP Business Network

entry.title: Re: Opening Balances: Group Financial Statements - Review...
entry.content: Hi Henrike - I actually created an incident initially but was met with extensive delays, so came to the group for assistance. I was however able to get an answer through the incident. The problem was system wide and corrected through a hotfix. I would note, that we still find this app to be unstable, but its been fairly adequate so leaving it for now.

entry.title: Advanced Currency Valuation and Define Rules for Determining Account Assignments in G/L Processes
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

 

During the Advanced currency valuation the Determining Account Assignments in G/L Processes is not as we desire.  In configuration activity Define Rules for Determining Account Assignments in G/L Processes we cannot change the inheritance option, it is greyed out for us. Would you please instruct us how to proceed?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Advanced Currency Valuation and Define Rules for Dete...
entry.content:
For Configuration activity Define Rules for Determining Account Assignments in G/L Processes id 104827

See configuration help on rules
Create rules for determining account assignments in G/L accounting processes.

Use

In this configuration step you create rules that are used to determine account assignment in G/L accounting processes. The rules are used, for example, when you carry out jobs using the following job templates in the Schedule General Ledger Jobs app:

Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation
Post Credit-Risk-Based Impairment
Post Discounting of Long-Term Assets and Liabilities
Post B/S Reclassification
Standard Settings

SAP delivers the following account assignment rules:

VALN
VREC
Each business transaction type belongs to one business transaction category and the system uses the delivered rule defined for that business transaction category.

You, as a customer, can only overwrite the business transaction type.

Activities

1. Choose New Entries.
2. Enter the following data.
Assignment Rule: Enter a four-digit ID starting with a Z.
Assignment Rule Description: Enter a description.
Controlling Object Inheritance Option: Decide how the account assignment is derived when this rule is used.
Reporting Field Inheritance Option: This field is preset and cannot be changed.
Default: This field is preset and cannot be changed. A rule with a checkmark is delivered by SAP.
3. Select the Assignment Rule and, in the dialog structure, choose Adjust Inheritance Option.
4. For each field in the list, you can specify in more detail how the account assignment is derived by the system when this rule is used.
5. Save your data.
Example

The business transaction category RFCV contains two business transaction types RFOP and RFCV.

The account assignment rule VALN account assignment rule is bound to the business transaction category RFCV. If you do not enter any configuration of your own, the system applies VALN account assignment rule for RFOP and RFCV.

You can define you own account assignment rule and overwrite RFOP. The system then applies your rule when items with RFOP business transaction type are valuated. But the system still uses VALN to valuate items belonging to the RFCV business transaction type.

See also blog https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/perform-foreign-currency-valuation-with-the-new-advanced-valuations-in-sap/ba-p/13529507

See also blog 3219200 - How to Post Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation

You are fully responsible for the customizing and postings on your system. Any changes should be thoroughly tested on your test system prior to implementation on production to ensure no negative impact.

entry.title: Re: Unable to access API Management in Integration Suite
entry.content: For me the two new instances automatically appeared after going to Settings -> APIs in the Integration Suite and made the initial configuration there.So it seems, there are different ways to do it.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation – SMTP Mail Destination using Microsoft 365 email provider
entry.content:
Hi @KarthikeyanMurthy Please find these Additinal information - SAP BTP destination configuration details i mentioned 

in username - i have provided mailbox mail id(SVC-SUID for our mail box) , password - i have provided mailbox password, in sender address - i have given mailbox mail id

entry.title: Error : Expression "DP1c.D029" cannot be found in the document dictionary.
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

After migrating this Web Intelligence dashboard from Preprod to Prod environment, I'm trying to remap the datasources to my two Excels and the Universe. Everything should work correctly as in Preprod, but I keep having this strange error message : 

"The expression "DP1c.D029" cannot be found in the document dictionary. Please enter another expression."

Does anyone know what to do ? I've tried multiple things and nothing seems to work. 

Thanks in advance ! 

 

SAP BusinessObjects - Web Intelligence (WebI)

entry.title: how to Change default browser in SAP Business One?
entry.content:
Hello community,

I'm trying to add Power BI report inside SAP B1 client using the Browser functionality, but it's not running, just showing the PBI logo, as per the result I reached to, it's because SAP B1 uses Internet Explorer as the default browser,

I tried to change browser default on the Windows server level from IE to Chrome, and it's updated fully, but still getting the same behavior, because SAP still uses IE not Chrome.

If we test the default browser on the server level we can see it's Chrome:

and even from the Default programs we can see it's Chrome as well:

so how we can change SAP B1 browser default?

 

 

 

System Details: 
1. SAP Business One 9.3 PL 10
2. Database: SQL Server 2014
3. Server: Windows Server 2019

 

Kenan JADDENE

entry.title: Re: Change a dataset in a SAC story and to keep the story...
entry.content: You can create a classic account model from dataset and then convert the classic account model to new model. https://help.sap.com/doc/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/2020.21/en-US/4a6bb52b0daf41b9b9767fa3a39eab9e.html

entry.title: Re: Reprocess Idocs in Background
entry.content: Hi team ,

it is not cloud system

just use normal way to connect to it via adt.

entry.content: Hi Experts, I am getting below error while using createOnboardee api, Error : Admin create user permission is required, do you have any idea what is missing ?

entry.title: Re: Asset Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
entry.content:
Please share your customer influence on our community page https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/influence-adopt

The responsible product managers review the customer influence requests and their votes. This will influence our portfolio and release planning.

entry.title: Data Integration in Form BPA- Destination/s Creation in BTP
entry.content:
Novice, learning 1st steps to BPA and its integration.

I am trying to understand what is the best way to create a single destination in BTP (for S4 On-Premise) to consume Odata service say for Cost Centres and Materials to further use returned results integrated in Forms of BPA.

See attached snapshots, I have created multiple (2 destinations) in BTP, one for Cost Centre and another for Materials, but sure I think it should be possible to parameterise specific API against field/s in Forms of BPA while referring the Data Source or somewhere else in BPA, or creating multiple destinations is the only way? My API's/fetch work and gets data from S4 but its a pain to manage multiple destination albeit creation is one time activity.

Destinations in BTP:

Data Source in BPA Form

Thanks

SK

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Re: Onboarding (2.0) with an External HRIS
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are Getting below error while posting the data using createOnboardee API.

Error:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" standalone="yes"?><error xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata"><code>COE_GENERAL_FORBIDDEN</code><message lang="en-US">[COE0020]Admin create user permission is required</message></error>

 

Could you please help me understand what can be ths issue ?

entry.title: Re: No measurement unit is assigned to ISO-Code SPACE
entry.content:
Hi... 

Faced the same issue , in BAPI you need to pass the Order Price unit to PO_PR_UOM Field

entry.title: Re: create excel sheet with password protection in back ground.
entry.content:
Hi Vic,

Yes you can add password protection.
How is this supposed to work?
There is no example report for that in ABAP2XLSX.

And I thought that this functionality is at the moment not supported? 
Encrypt with Password · Issue #1210 · abap2xlsx/abap2xlsx · GitHub

Maybe you can help us and with a sample coding?

BR
scali

entry.title: Re: Introducing the new CRR Control Center to monitor Record & Replay in SUM 2.0
entry.content:
Hi @jensfieger 

We used nZDM with replication for applying SPS updates. We try to implement a change freeze on the landscape involving any enhancements with SAP standard objects just so we can ensure consistent SPDD/SPAU adjustments in all systems on the landscape up to the lock development phase.

Is there any further explanation please on what sort of table changes are replicated with CRR and if this replication occurs all the way up to downtime phase, past the lock development phase? My understanding is that it's more to do with data within tables changing rather than replicating DDIC changes? please correct me if I'm wrong. I just want to make sure we're using nZDM properly for it's intended purpose.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Asset Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
entry.content:
Regarding the question from chandanmex submitted on 16th Nov: 

Enable in-house refurbishment

 is on the radar. You will find it on the roadmap as product vision but currently without any planned product version 

https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=67837800100800007389&range=CURRENT-LAST#Q4%202024;INNO=42F2E964FAAF1ED9B6E2FF2C6FD840DE

Also another topic is on the roadmap as product vision: 

Enable the refurbishment of spare parts with subcontractors

https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=67837800100800007389&range=CURRENT-LAST#Q4%202024;INNO=42F2E964FAAF1ED9B6E22E90E51B20DE

The above mentioned roadmap entries are valid for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. For Private Edition there are also internal discussions how to support refurbishment requirements.

entry.title: Re: Invoice Paid Status is not getting reflected in Ariba Network
entry.content: customer is having the same issue, is there a solution?

entry.title: Re: Purchasing a discounted certification attempt
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano and @Anne_Lenhardt 

I forgotten to register the digital skills for free certification.

But  I followed all the steps and I have learnt the course is sap fiori developer in sap learning hub.

Could please consider the my registration and make me eligible for free certification.

Hope, I am eagerly waiting for response.

Thanks

Swaroop.

entry.title: Re: Screen exits in HUPAST
entry.content:
The request is quite old and I'm curious how you solved the problem.
I had the same problem and solved it by using BAdI  BADI_HU_PACKING_ALW

in there I used FM  CALL FUNCTION 'SERIAL_LISTE_HU to be able to enter serial number

and FM     CALL FUNCTION 'V51P_XVEPO_YVEPO_UPDATE to save the serial numbers to the HU item.

Regards

Lars

entry.title: Re: Allow Version C/D SAP IBP Fiori but remove authorizat...
entry.content:
Hi,

As far as I could find, it does not seem to be possible to allow for Application Jobs to run Copy Version and Delete Version, but at the same time restrict the 'Manage Version' functionality to not be shown from the Excel Add-In. Instead, remove the mentioned VERSION authorization from as many users as possible who are not expected to run Version copies into Backup versions, and keep them only for a very limited set of trusted and trained users.

Kind regards,

Vincent Verheyen

entry.title: SAP IBP - Adjusted key figure calculation definition isn't working
entry.content:
Hi,

We need to create an editable key figure  ZZTESTACTQTY2(adjusted)  initialized with ACTUALSQTY if ZZTESTACTQTY2 has no value

Calculation definition --> ZZTESTACTQTY2@WKPRODLOCCUST = IF(ISNULL("ZZTESTACTQTY2@WKPRODLOCCUST"), "ACTUALSQTY@WKPRODLOCCUST", "ZZTESTACTQTY2@WKPRODLOCCUST")

In this case the calculation work correctly, we did an adjustment only on TW42  2023. For this example we use standard IBP Key figure.

We tried to replicate the logic that you can see above, using a new planning level with a different time attribute (month)

with the same calculation definition-->ZZADJTEST@ZZMTHPRODLOCCUST2 = IF(ISNULL("ZZADJTEST@ZZMTHPRODLOCCUST2"), "ZZUSCITETEST@ZZMTHPRODLOCCUST2","ZZADJTEST@ZZMTHPRODLOCCUST2")

As you can see on the screenshot below , the new key figure isn't working

We need to know how to create this logic correclty , and we want to know the reason of the malfunction despite the logics being identical , as you can see it.

entry.title: SAP CONNECTION PACKAGE CLOUD
entry.content:
Is there a VPN included in the base package and for DR if selected?

There is nothing in the service guide that states that a VPN is included that I can find.

It only shows up on the SAP Connection Package.

Thanks.

entry.title: Data Replication Framework (DRF) General Ledger
entry.content:
Hello at all,

I have configured the DRF to replicate General Ledger. I use the OutbImpl. 1010 (General Ledger Account Master).
For the SOAP-configuration I use the CO_USMD_GENLEDACCMRPLCTNRQ. If I made a ping test it works.
I am not sure what is the right combination for the OutbImpl. and for the SOAP-Service. 

If I try to use Transaction DRFOUT to send data, I got an exception.  

My real question is:
What is the OutbImp. and SOAP Service to replicate General Ledger. 
In the SAP Hep Side, there is no information about the API.

kind regards

Gunter

entry.title: IBP Excel Add-In Error: Impossible to open the report editor. Check that all reports are connected
entry.content:
Hi fellow experts,

Encountering the following issue in Excel Add-In, when attempting to open the 'Report Editor' from the 'Template Admin' section of the Excel Add-In:

SAP IBP: Error
Impossible to open the report editor. Check that all reports are connected.

Is anyone else experiencing the same? Are there any known solutions?

The above was tested on:

  • SAP IBP Excel Add-In Version: 2411.2.0
  • Planning View template based on the official ChartVBA_AddIn.xlsm of 2411.

Kind regards,

Vincent Verheyen

entry.title: Re: Error Loading 0FI_GL_4 Datasource to SAP Datasphere:...
entry.content:
Hi,

Best solutions

1. using BW Bridge

2. using CDS view instead of 0FI_GL_4

even though you modify SAPI extractor to enable 0FI_GL_4 delta-enable, you may encounter another issue..

entry.title: Re: Change valuation class for multiple periods/single pe...
entry.content:
Thanks, your answer convinced me that we were on the right path. I found a lower level system that was still in the previous period and made the same changes there. After that moved the period and indeed the last period data is transferred to the new one.

This makes the SAP standard message incorrect, but me very happy since changing the data is now much easier. 🙂

entry.title: Re: Seamless Planning - Beta Program Highlights
entry.content:
Hi @Chris_Kornely 

Although we plan to offer such functionality, we don't yet have a release timeline. One prerequisite that will apply is having the SAC model of the type new/universal model, not the account model. 

Changing the data persistency could be achieved today only through a workaround, which, depending on the use case and landscape, might be doable: backup the model and dependent objects using the content network, delete the content from the SAC tenant, and reimport it from the content network. Upon reimporting, you can choose the data storage as DSP.

entry.title: Re: SAP Data Quality Management (SAP DQM) and Cloud for Customer (C4C)
entry.content: I eventually got this working, but the C4C documentation is not very clear at all within here....https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-cloud-for-customer/solution-guide-for-sap-service-cloud/9485f5bfefaf432e9ea7ba6029fb6263.html?q=address+validation+communciation+arrangement#loio8e97c7edd636470a8fee5d72fa8bf07d as it says note! dont change these fields but you actually have to change fields in order to get it to work. Now the challenge is how do you get to the mapping config. In here https://help.sap.com/docs/data-quality-services/data-quality-services/create-configuration it tells you how to add config mapping, which is fine. but it talks about the configuration name is passed by the requesting application. In this case C4C and nothing in docs to state where this is passed, it talks about in the JSON message from C4C to DQMm

entry.title: Learn from an SAP Signavio Expert via our live session offering
entry.content:
Did you know you can enhance your SAP Signavio expertise with free live sessions on the SAP Learning Platform? These sessions provide valuable insights into key functionalities and workflows, helping you get the most out of your SAP Signavio solutions.

Simply visit the SAP Learning Platform, select the learning journey of your choice, and scroll down to discover available live sessions. Register for a session and if you are not able to join, you will benefit from a recording that you can watch any time. 

Important Note:
To register, you’ll need an SAP Universal ID. Don’t have one? Visit the SAP Universal ID page to create one quickly and easily.

Check out the following upcoming live sessions I would like to mention here in specific:

Live Session TitleDate More Details
Working in SAP Signavio Process Manager and Collaboration HubDec 2, 2024, 10:00 - 12:00 GMT+1Link
Creating and managing approval workflows with SAP Signavio Process GovernanceDec 4, 2024, 10:00 - 12:00 GMT+1Link
Working in SAP Signavio Process Manager and Collaboration HubJan 23, 2025, 10:00 - 12:00 GMT+1Link
Creating and managing approval workflows with SAP Signavio Process GovernanceJan 30, 2025, 10:00 - 12:00 GMT+1Link

Don’t miss these opportunities to grow your skills and connect with SAP experts. Reserve your spot today and take a step toward mastering SAP Signavio!

entry.title: QM quality notification EWM integration vendor returns
entry.content:
Hi all,
 
As described on SAP help:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/2bc3ee8d1c83404e8cf62418640004f2/15a64024397f4e219c2c800576023304.html?locale=en-US
To enable an EWM transfer posting additionally to the Quality Notification an additional warehouse defect has to be created to enrich the QN with warehouse information.
When the issue is triggered by a warehouse defect this is a acceptable start to perform the steps:
  • Warehouse defect
  • Create QN Q2
  • Assign warehouse defect 
But if the starting point is the Quality Notification (i.e. triggered from a inspection lot defect) the creation of a warehouse defect and transfer via manage defects seems like obsolete steps just to enrich the QN with warehouse information.
Is there a possibility to extent the warehouse information within the QN without 2 additional required apps to perform this task.
 
Kind regards
Michael

entry.title: Re: Managing AI Models with SAP AI Core on BTP: Setup to Deployment Using Docker, GitHub & Objec
entry.content: Is it now supported to use on-premise Docker repo and on-premise GitHub from AI Core via SAP Cloud Connector like it was possible in SAP Data Intelligence ?

entry.title: Re: How to bind selected values from a multi combo box to a variable in SAP Build Apps?
entry.content: Hi, we are using multi combo box quite similarly. But we use appVars due to the fact that the result is needed on a second page. This works of course fine. But when navigating back the selection is gone. Do you have any advice how to show again the selected tokens?

entry.title: how to Change default browser in SAP Business One?
entry.content:
Hello community,

I'm trying to add Power BI report inside SAP B1 client using the Browser functionality, but it's not running, just showing the PBI logo, as per the result I reached to, it's because SAP B1 uses Internet Explorer as the default browser,

I tried to change browser default on the Windows server level from IE to Chrome, and it's updated fully, but still getting the same behavior, because SAP still uses IE not Chrome.

If we test the default browser on the server level we can see it's Chrome:

and even from the Default programs we can see it's Chrome as well:

so how we can change SAP B1 browser default?

System Details: 
1. SAP Business One 9.3 PL 10
2. Database: SQL Server 2014
3. Server: Windows Server 2019

Kenan JADDENE

entry.title: Re: How to extract the XML file with data for dunning let...
entry.content:
Hi all,

I tried out in app 'Create Dunning Notice', it worked. Via menu->Output you can navigate to the output, then create a new output item via 'Add Output' (with adding a new item via 'Duplicate' it does NOT work), enter missing field values like in completed item, enter #&&DOWNLOAD_FORM_DATA_XML&&# as Print Queue Name, then press 'Display Document'.
Best regards, Gabi

entry.title: I need to convert these loops to the new version 7.5 syntax with value
entry.content:
LOOP AT t_bseg ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_bseg>) where hkont = <fs_cuentas>-saknr.
          LOOP AT t_grupo2 INTO DATA(wa_grupo2) WHERE bukrs = p_bukrs AND gjahr = p_ejer AND belnr = <fs_bseg>-belnr AND buzei = <fs_bseg>-buzei.
            lv_monto_gp2 = lv_monto_gp2 + wa_grupo2-bwshb.
          ENDLOOP.
ENDLOOP.

entry.title: Re: SAP Personas , script OnEnter with unwanted "enter" f...
entry.content:
Hello Cristin,

Finally I didn't managed to adjust my script.

So I created new fields for the material and quantity and copy these values to the standard field when the user is ok.

Thanks anyway.

entry.title: Re: Subcontracting Process in Extended Warehouse Management
entry.content: What is the configuration step required for stock usage (Subcontractor) in Outbound delivery order?

entry.title: How to enable the create button in the Flexible Programming Model?
entry.content:
Hi, everybody.

I have a problem with my custom page. I can currently see what I want but the create button is only visible when I enter edit mode. How do I make the button visible without having to edit some record?

I am using a service made in CAP and I have draft enabled.

Edit mode

Reading mode

entry.title: Re: Understanding the rollup hierarchy method of planning
entry.content:
Hi @xavierlegarrec 

Just a clarification . 

Client need everyone in one sheet. So if I am using Rollup Hierarchy, I will make CEO as the planner and then launch the worksheet. So everyone comes in that sheet except CEO. As CEO is missing i will go to Add Employee and then add CEO also in the same worksheet. In system I am able to do this . But do you think it will create any problem?

Thanks, 

PP

entry.title: MODELO DE AUTORIZACIÓN DOCUMENTO VENCIDO
entry.content:
Buenas tardes para todos he intentado realizar un query para un modelo de autorización el cual cada vez que un cliente tenga una factura vencida se active el modelo de autorización para que sea aprobado.

Actualmente cuento con el siguiente Query pero no me aparece la ventana para enviar al aprobador "Por favor pueden ayudarme a validar que me hace falta para que funcione correctamente ? 

SELECT DISTINCT
'TRUE'
FROM
OCRD T1
INNER JOIN
OINV T2 ON T1."CardCode" = T2."CardCode"
WHERE
T1."CardCode" = $[ORDR.CardCode]
AND T2."DocStatus" = 'O'
AND T2."DocDueDate" < GETDATE()



 

Muchas gracias quedare muy atento.

entry.title: Re: New 2H 2024 SAP Successfactors Time (Tracking) Features
entry.content: Thank you @Volker_Ruof . Can you please share the link? I cannot see it in the SAP deep links documentation Deep Links in Employee Central | SAP Help Portal, nor the feature documentation. Thank you very much.

entry.title: Post request to /API_PRODUCT_SRV/A_Product is returning XML instead of JSON
entry.content:
Hi community!

I'm using the API /API_PRODUCT_SRV/A_Product to create products via Http call. According to the API documentation (https://api.sap.com/api/OP_API_PRODUCT_SRV_0001/path/post_A_Product), the content of the response should be a JSON object in both success and error case scenarios, but I'm getting an XML response content.

I'm sending a JSON object in my request body and setting the content type header as "application/json". I have been able to successfully create products by sending POST requests to this end-point but I'm still receiving an XML object in the response content.

If I add the query parameter "$format=json" to my request URL, I get a Bad Request response saying that my request contains invalid parameters, but this time the response content is a JSON object.

What should I do in order to get a JSON response as described in the documentation.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: SAC script to obtain Story Folder
entry.content:
Hi experts, here is a technical goal. 

In the SAC optimised story I would like a text box to be made visible only when the stories save folder path meets a certain criteria. 

ie

If the current Story path contains "Pathx" then Text box = visible 

It is so that we can make a clear visible distinction when people open stories saved in the 'centrally approved' folder where stories are validated and those homebrew stories that are being run from users own folders. 

I have tried to look if there is some script where I can obtain the story path, but cant find it. 

 

Any ideas?

Thanks all

entry.title: SAP Personas, store a sound as resource.
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to play a specific sound on user error.

I found a way to store it on Jukehost (https://gist.github.com/Moutard3/b925b090ab1d6d20a5d20f054bae7bca#opendrive), it's working but sometimes it takes some time to play it.

Is there a way to store it as resource in the SAP server and play it?

I tried but couldn't achieve it.

Thanks,

Emmanuel.

entry.title: Re: Introduction to Service with Advanced Execution in SAP S/4HANA 2023
entry.content:
Hi Ramesh

Thanks for a useful blog. We are busy implementing S4H Service (Private cloud) and will definately be using the advanced execution model. I am unclear as to whether we should use the Legacy Organizational Management model or the Enterprise Organization model.  From the description in the doco I tend more towards using EOM, but In the Learning path (Configuring SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition for Service) they say Legacy Org model is a "pre-requisite" and that it is not recommended to use EOM with advanced exeuction. 

Is this correct? I understand that with EOM the automatic determination of planning plant and work center is not possible - that is a definitate negative. Is this the reason and is there no way to do so like BADI?

Could you shed some light on that?


Thanks

Patrick
